---
title: "Big Data & Analytics"
format: html
---

:::  {.callout-important title="Preparation"}
See [preparation notes](preparation.html).
:::

## Sessions

### Introductory

| Date       | Session   | Topic                         | Lecture                                                                                                                    | Exercise |
|------------|-----------|-------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|
|            | –         | Course Logistics              | [slides](slides/lecture_0_orga.html), [notes](notes/lecture_0_orga.html)                                                     |          |
| 2026-03-23 | Session 1 | Foundations of data analytics | [slides](slides/lecture_1_foundations_of_data_analytics.html), [notes](notes/lecture_1_foundations_of_data_analytics.html) | [exercise](exercises/exercise_1.html) |

### Structured Data

| Date       | Session   | Topic                          | Lecture                                                                                                                      | Exercise |
|------------|-----------|--------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|
| 2026-03-23 | Session 2 | Structuring and preparing data | [slides](slides/lecture_2_structuring_preparing_data.html), [notes](notes/lecture_2_structuring_preparing_data.html)         | [exercise](exercises/exercise_2.html) |
| 2026-03-30 | Session 3 | Exploratory data analysis      | [slides](slides/lecture_3_exploratory_data_analysis.html), [notes](notes/lecture_3_exploratory_data_analysis.html)                 | [exercise](exercises/exercise_3.html) |
| 2026-03-30 | Session 4 | Regression I                   | [slides](slides/lecture_4_regression_1.html), [notes](notes/lecture_4_regression_1.html)                 | [exercise](exercises/exercise_4.html) |
| 2026-04-14 | Session 5 | Regression II                  | [slides](slides/lecture_5_regression_2.html), [notes](notes/lecture_5_regression_2.html)                       | [exercise](exercises/exercise_5.html) |
| 2026-04-20 | Session 6 | Machine learning I             | [slides](slides/lecture_6_machine_learning_1.html), [notes](notes/lecture_6_machine_learning_1.html)                   | [exercise](exercises/exercise_6.html) |
| 2026-04-20 | Session 7 | Machine learning II            | [slides](slides/lecture_7_machine_learning_2.html), [notes](notes/lecture_7_machine_learning_2.html)                                   | [exercise](exercises/exercise_7.html) |


### Big Data

| Date       | Session   | Topic                     | Lecture                                                                                                            | Exercise |
|------------|-----------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|
| 2026-04-04 | Session 8 | Big data                  | [slides](slides/lecture_8_big_data.html), [notes](notes/lecture_8_big_data.html)           | [exercise](exercises/exercise_8.html) |
| 2026-04-04 | Session 9 | Analytics case examples   | [slides](slides/lecture_9_analytics_case_examples.html), [notes](notes/lecture_9_analytics_case_examples.html)             | [exercise](exercises/exercise_9.html) |

### Organizations

| Date       | Session    | Topic                        | Lecture                                                                                                          | Exercise |
|------------|------------|------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|
| 2026-04-11 | Session 10 | Governance of data analytics | [slides](slides/lecture_10_data_governance.html), [notes](notes/lecture_10_data_governance.html)                 | [exercise](exercises/exercise_10.html) |
| 2026-04-11 | Session 11 | Recap, exam preparation, Q&A | [slides](slides/lecture_11_recap.html), [notes](notes/lecture_11_recap.html)                                     | [exercise](exercises/exercise_11.html) |

## Group work

-  To come, see `group-projects`.
